P5R4+6R Pine Grove Mills, PA, USA

Huge patch of blackberries all throughout the area under the power lines and some lowbush blueberries (there are more in the woods, especially near the vista at the northeastern end of the power lines) Falling Fruit season: August-August.
P5W7+MQ Pine Grove Mills, PA, USA

The forest floor in this area is almost completely covered in lowbush blueberries. Likely you'll get a decent harvest some years and almost none in others but if you're lucky you can spend hours in here munching on bloobs. Access: Public.
